/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/encrypt_tool.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/encrypt_tool.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encrypt_tool.dir/CryptoConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encrypt_tool.dir/FileEncryptor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encrypt_tool.dir/KATRunner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encrypt_tool.dir/NISTValidator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encrypt_tool.dir/NegativeTests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encrypt_tool.dir/Benchmarker.cpp.o -o encrypt_tool  /home/kali/Desktop/REPORT_5_LAB/cryptopp/lib/linux/libcryptopp.a -lpthread
